title: Human at the Core: Women in AI & Tech
description: A panel discussion exploring the intersection of gender diversity and AI in the workplace.
oneLiner: Panel exploring gender diversity and AI adoption in the Singapore workplace.
targetAudience: Tech professionals and allies interested in diversity & inclusion in AI workplaces
findPartner: Women in tech founders, enterprise HR leads, D&I advocates in large organisations
scoreNote: Good community event; content is broader diversity/AI rather than technical depth.

title: ClickHouse Tech Session: Real-Time AI Pipelines
description: Deep-dive into building real-time AI data pipelines with ClickHouse — from ingestion to inference.
oneLiner: Hands-on deep-dive into ClickHouse-powered real-time AI pipelines — from ingestion to inference.
targetAudience: Data engineers, ML engineers, and backend developers building real-time AI systems
findPartner: MLOps engineers, AI infra founders, CTOs evaluating real-time data infrastructure
scoreNote: Hands-on technical content from a credible open-source data company.

title: AI For Normies — Making AI Work for You
description: Plain-language workshop on how non-technical professionals can integrate AI tools into their daily workflow.
oneLiner: Plain-language session on integrating AI tools into daily work — no coding required.
targetAudience: Non-technical professionals, managers, and business owners exploring AI adoption
findPartner: AI consultants targeting SMEs, productivity SaaS founders, enterprise change managers
scoreNote: Accessible entry point for non-technical attendees.

title: Acacia AI Summit 2026
description: Annual AI summit by Acacia AI Society with speakers from industry and academia on frontier AI, careers, and research.
oneLiner: Annual NUS student-led AI summit with industry speakers on frontier AI, research, and careers.
targetAudience: Students, fresh graduates, and early-career professionals exploring AI paths
findPartner: Campus recruiters, AI research lab reps, startup founders looking for early talent
scoreNote: Good student-led summit; strong NUS network, mix of content levels.

title: Navigating Tech Careers with AI Support
description: Workshop for tech professionals on leveraging AI tools for job search, resume writing, and career transitions.
oneLiner: Workshop on using AI tools to accelerate job search, resume writing, and career transitions.
targetAudience: Mid-career tech professionals considering a role change or upskilling with AI
findPartner: Recruiters, career coaches, L&D leads, HR tech founders
scoreNote: Career-focused, not deeply technical. Good for people in transition.

title: Langfuse Singapore Meetup — LLM Observability
description: Hands-on session on instrumenting LLM applications with Langfuse — tracing, evaluation, and cost monitoring.
oneLiner: LLM observability in practice — tracing, evaluation, and cost monitoring with Langfuse.
targetAudience: ML engineers and developers running LLMs in production who need monitoring and tracing
findPartner: LLMOps tooling founders, AI infra investors, ML platform engineers at Series A+ startups
scoreNote: Practical LLMOps content. High signal-to-noise for teams shipping AI to production.

title: Hermes AI Agent Night — Singapore AI Community
description: The flagship weekly AI event at Lorong AI. Demos, pitches, and open discussions on AI agents, infra, and applications. Consistently the most attended AI event in Singapore.
oneLiner: Singapore's flagship weekly AI event — live demos, pitches, and 700+ builders every Thursday.
targetAudience: AI builders, researchers, founders, and investors — Singapore's most diverse AI crowd
findPartner: Co-founders, early customers, AI investors, team builders, developer tool vendors
scoreNote: Singapore's #1 AI community event by attendance. Must-attend for AI builders and investors.

title: Claude Bloom — Singapore Build Night
description: Official Anthropic Singapore community event focused on building with Claude. Includes API workshops, agent demos, and product updates from the Claude team.
oneLiner: Official Anthropic community event with Claude API workshops, agent demos, and product roadmap updates.
targetAudience: Developers and product teams actively building with Claude API or evaluating Anthropic models
findPartner: Other Claude API builders, Anthropic ecosystem partners, enterprise AI decision-makers
venue: AWS Singapore, 2 Central Blvd, Downtown Core
scoreNote: Official Anthropic event. First-party access to Claude API updates.

title: AI Demo Night Singapore
description: Lightning demo format — 5-minute slots for builders showing live AI applications. Open to all levels; Q&A after each demo.
oneLiner: Lightning-format demo night — 5 minutes per builder to show what they've actually shipped.
targetAudience: Builders wanting to show or discover what others are shipping in AI right now
findPartner: Early adopters for product feedback, technical co-founders, angel investors doing discovery
venue: National Library Board, 100 Victoria Street, Singapore
scoreNote: High discovery value — live demos are the best way to see what builders are actually shipping.

title: Relational Code 101: AI & Databases Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering vector databases, embeddings, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) patterns. Hosted at Lifelong Learning Institute.
oneLiner: Paid hands-on workshop on vector databases, embeddings, and RAG patterns in production.
targetAudience: Backend developers and data engineers implementing RAG and semantic search
findPartner: Database tool vendors, AI infrastructure companies, developer experience founders
venue: Lifelong Learning Institute, 11 Eunos Road 8, Singapore
scoreNote: Practical RAG content; small paid workshop format.

title: AI Strategy Seminar — CEIBS Global EMBA
description: Executive seminar on AI strategy for business leaders, covering AI adoption frameworks, risk management, and competitive positioning in the Asia-Pacific market.
oneLiner: Executive seminar on AI strategy, risk management, and competitive positioning for APAC markets.
targetAudience: C-suite and senior executives building AI adoption strategies for their organisations
findPartner: Enterprise AI vendors, management consultants, AI governance and compliance experts
scoreNote: Reputable institution; executive-level content, not for engineers.

title: AI Tools Bootcamp for Service Businesses
description: Practical bootcamp for small business owners — clinics, salons, dental practices — covering AI-powered booking, customer communication, and lead generation tools.
oneLiner: Practical bootcamp for service business owners on AI-powered booking and customer communication.
targetAudience: Owners of appointment-based businesses (clinics, salons, dental practices) adopting AI tools
findPartner: AI SaaS founders targeting SME/healthcare verticals, digital marketing agencies
venue: Stripe HQ, 1 Harbourfront Avenue, Tanjong Pagar
scoreNote: Niche audience; limited appeal outside the SME/appointment sector.
